title: EPF interest at 8.25%: How your monthly interest is calculated and ways to check if it has been credited
summary: The EPFO's board of trustees approved an 8.25% EPF interest rate for FY2025-26, but interest has not been credited yet. Interest is calculated on the total EPF balance and typically credited between June and September 2026, following government approval.

title: 8th Pay Commission: ₹75L gratuity ceiling, enhanced death benefits — what changes are being sought in gratuity rules?
summary: Ahead of the 8th Pay Commission, employee bodies propose changes to gratuity rules, including a higher ceiling and revised calculations. Proposals include raising the cap to ₹50 lakh, periodic reviews, and better death benefits, reflecting a need for modernization in gratuity provisions.

title: ITR filing 2026: Only earning rental income? Check if you still have to file tax return
summary: Rental income can be the sole earnings for taxpayers, especially retirees or property owners. Even without regular employment income, filing an income tax return is necessary. Tax obligations depend on various factors, including rental income amount, deductions, and overall tax position.
